dashboard.label: Attack Detection Lab - Windows Security Monitoring
dashboard.description: SIEM detections for RDP brute force, credential dumping (Mimikatz), and PowerShell reverse shell. Victim host DESKTOP-ABVS6BR, attacker 192.168.56.102 (Kali). Source: WinEventLog:Security.

panel.title: Security Event Volume by Event Code

search.query: index=main sourcetype=WinEventLog:Security | stats count by EventCode | sort -count

panel.title: RDP Brute Force: Failed Logons (4625) Over Time

search.query: index=main EventCode=4625 | timechart span=5m count as failed_logons
index=main (EventCode=4624 OR EventCode=4625) | timechart span=10m count by EventCode

panel.title: Brute Force: Source IP and Targeted Account (4625)

search.query: index=main EventCode=4625 | stats count as failed_attempts by Source_Network_Address, Account_Name, Failure_Reason | sort -failed_attempts
index=main EventCode=4688 (New_Process_Name="*mimikatz*" OR Process_Command_Line="*mimikatz*") | table _time, ComputerName, Account_Name, Creator_Process_Name, New_Process_Name, Process_Command_Line

index=main EventCode=4688 New_Process_Name="*\\powershell.exe" (Process_Command_Line="*DownloadString*" OR Process_Command_Line="*Net.WebClient*" OR Process_Command_Line="*IEX*" OR Process_Command_Line="*TCPClient*" OR Process_Command_Line="*Net.Sockets*") | table _time, ComputerName, Account_Name, Creator_Process_Name, Process_Command_Line
